$emergencyId..validate:
newData.hasChildren(['driverId','type','latitude','longitude','status','timestamp']) &&

          newData.child('driverId').isString() &&
          newData.child('driverId').val() === auth.uid &&

          newData.child('type').isString() &&
          (
            newData.child('type').val() === 'Medical' ||
            newData.child('type').val() === 'Hijack' ||
            newData.child('type').val() === 'Breakdown' ||
            newData.child('type').val() === 'Accident' ||
            newData.child('type').val() === 'Fire' ||
            newData.child('type').val() === 'Road Hazard'
          ) &&

          newData.child('latitude').isNumber() &&
          newData.child('latitude').val() >= -90 &&
          newData.child('latitude').val() <= 90 &&

          newData.child('longitude').isNumber() &&
          newData.child('longitude').val() >= -180 &&
          newData.child('longitude').val() <= 180 &&

          newData.child('status').isString() &&
          (
            newData.child('status').val() === 'pending' ||
            newData.child('status').val() === 'acknowledged' ||
            newData.child('status').val() === 'resolved'
          ) &&

          newData.child('timestamp').isNumber()
